clusters.justification: These terms reflect the processing of autonomic arousal, emotional reactivity, and interoceptive states primarily mediated by macroscopic cortico-limbic and somatomotor co-activation patterns.
This cluster captures the subjective appraisal of external stimuli, rewards, and incentives that drive motivated behavior and choice via striato-cortical reinforcement pathways.
These concepts share an underlying reliance on overarching default-mode co-activations to internally model, represent, and evaluate the conceptual self alongside the mental states of others.
